sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36667" key="e)calmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξαλμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n36667.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἔξαλσις</ref></xr>, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄφαλσις,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:6:31:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.31.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
